summary: Iteration 17 - Testing 3 New Features: (1) Single Device Session Enforcement, (2) Demo-based Chat Contacts, (3) Student Locked View with Chat Button. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 role dashboards verified working via Playwright UI tests.

single_device_session: SINGLE DEVICE: Student login - token1 invalidated after token2 created - PASSED
SINGLE DEVICE: Teacher login - token1 invalidated after token2 created - PASSED
SINGLE DEVICE: Admin login - token1 invalidated after token2 created - PASSED
demo_chat_contacts: CHAT CONTACTS: Admin sees all users - PASSED
CHAT CONTACTS: Counsellor sees all users - PASSED
CHAT CONTACTS: Student can message counsellors - PASSED
CHAT CONTACTS: Teacher sees demo students in contacts - PASSED
CHAT CONTACTS: Student sees demo teachers in contacts - PASSED
DEMO FLOW: Create demo -> Teacher accepts -> Both see each other in chat -> Both can send messages - PASSED
regression_tests: REGRESSION: Admin dashboard endpoints (teachers, students, pricing, all-users) - PASSED
REGRESSION: Student enrollment status endpoint - PASSED
frontend_tests: Homepage loads with Kaimera Learning branding
Student locked view shows locked banner with 'not enrolled' message
Student locked view shows Chat button (data-testid='chat-button') - VERIFIED
Student locked view shows Book a Free Demo button
Student locked view shows My Profile and Wallet buttons
Teacher dashboard shows Dr. Maria Garcia with ID: KL-T0002 and 5.0 rating
Admin dashboard shows Operations Center with User Management
Counsellor dashboard shows Sarah Wilson with stats cards

single_device_session.implementation: create_session in services/auth.py deletes all existing sessions before creating new one
single_device_session.test_method: Login twice, verify first token returns 401 after second login

demo_chat_contacts.implementation: chat.py contacts and send endpoints now query class_sessions with is_demo:True
demo_chat_contacts.test_method: Create demo request, teacher accepts, verify both parties see each other in /api/chat/contacts

student_locked_view_chat.implementation: StudentDashboard.js locked view now includes Chat button with data-testid='chat-button'
student_locked_view_chat.test_method: Login as non-enrolled student, verify Chat button is visible

critical_code_review_comments: Single device session correctly implemented - delete_many before insert_one in create_session
Demo chat contacts properly query class_sessions with is_demo:True for both teacher and student roles
Student locked view correctly shows Chat button even when not enrolled
All 3 requested features are working as expected
seed_data_creation: Test demo students created during testing (TEST_demo_* prefix) for chat integration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 - All 3 new features verified working: (1) Single device session - login on new device invalidates previous session token, (2) Demo-based chat contacts - after teacher accepts demo, both teacher and student see each other in chat contacts and can send messages, (3) Student locked view shows Chat button even when not enrolled. All 4 role logins and dashboards working. Test accounts: admin (info@kaimeralearning.com), teacher1 (KL-T0002), student1 (KL-S0002), counsellor1 - all with documented passwords.
